entries.name: Amphibious
entries.text: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

entries.name: Eldritch Restoration
entries.text: If destroyed, the aboleth gains a new body in 5d10 days, reviving with all its Hit Points in the Far Realm or another location chosen by the DM.

entries.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries.text: If the aboleth fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

entries.name: Mucus Cloud
entries.text: While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by mucus. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the aboleth at the end of the aboleth's turn. Failure: The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target's skin becomes slimy, the target can breathe air and water, and it can't regain Hit Points unless it is underwater. While the cursed creature is outside a body of water, the creature takes 6 (1d12) Acid damage at the end of every 10 minutes unless moisture is applied to its skin before those minutes have passed.

entries.name: Probing Telepathy
entries.text: If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The aboleth makes two Tentacle attacks and uses either Consume Memories or Dominate Mind if available.

entries.name: Tentacle
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 15 ft. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of four tentacles.

entries.name: Consume Memories
entries.text: Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature within 30 feet that is Charmed or Grappled by the aboleth. Failure: 10 (3d6) Psychic damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: The aboleth gains the target's memories if the target is a Humanoid and is reduced to 0 Hit Points by this action.

entries.name: Dominate Mind (2/Day)
entries.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the aboleth can see within 30 feet. Failure: The target has the Charmed condition until the aboleth dies or is on a different plane of existence from the target. While Charmed, the target acts as an ally to the aboleth and is under its control while within 60 feet of it. In addition, the aboleth and the target can communicate telepathically with each other over any distance. The target repeats the save whenever it takes damage as well as after every 24 hours it spends at least 1 mile away from the aboleth, ending the effect on itself on a success.

sections.title: Legendary Actions
sections.intro: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair): Immediately after another creature's turn, the aboleth can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The aboleth regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

entries.name: Lash
entries.text: The aboleth makes one Tentacle attack.

entries.name: Psychic Drain
entries.text: If the aboleth has at least one creature Charmed or Grappled, it uses Consume Memories and regains 5 (1d10) Hit Points.

entries.name: Air Form
entries.text: The elemental can enter a creature's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The elemental makes two Thunderous Slam attacks.

entries.name: Thunderous Slam
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Thunder damage.

entries.name: Whirlwind (Recharge 4–6)
entries.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 13, one Medium or smaller creature in the elemental's space. Failure: 24 (4d10 + 2) Thunder damage, and the target is pushed up to 20 feet straight away from the elemental and has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only. Animal Lord

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The armor makes two Slam attacks.

entries.name: Slam
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

entries.name: Slash
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage.

entries.name: Smother
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the rug can give it the Grappled condition (escape DC 13) instead of dealing damage. Until the grapple ends, the target has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, is suffocating, and takes 10 (2d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage at the start of each of its turns. The rug can smother only one creature at a time. While grappling the target, the rug can't take this action, the rug halves the damage it takes (round down), and the target takes the same amount of damage. Ankheg

entries.name: Tunneler
entries.text: The ankheg can burrow through solid rock at half its Burrow Speed and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

entries.name: Bite
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5 (with Advantage if the target is Grappled by the ankheg), reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Acid damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13).

entries.name: Acid Spray (Recharge 6)
entries.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 30-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 14 (4d6) Acid damage. Success: Half damage. John Patrick Gañas Arcanaloth

entries.name: Evasion
entries.text: If the assassin is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the assassin instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The assassin makes three attacks, using Shortsword or Light Crossbow in any combination.

entries.name: Shortsword
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 17 (5d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the assassin's next turn.

entries.name: Light Crossbow
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +7, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 21 (6d6) Poison damage.

entries.name: Cunning Action
entries.text: The assassin takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action. Awakened Plants

entries.name: Rake
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

entries.name: Slam
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. Axe Beaks

entries.name: Beak
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage.

entries.name: Fire Aura
entries.text: At the end of each of the azer's turns, each creature of the azer's choice in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the azer takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage unless the azer has the Incapacitated condition.

entries.name: Illumination
entries.text: The azer sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

entries.name: Burning Hammer
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

entries.name: Death Throes
entries.text: The balor explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 20, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the balor. Failure: 31 (9d6) Fire damage plus 31 (9d6) Force damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: If the balor dies outside the Abyss, it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

entries.name: Fire Aura
entries.text: At the end of each of the balor's turns, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the balor takes 13 (3d8) Fire damage.

entries.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries.text: If the balor fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

entries.name: Magic Resistance
entries.text: The balor has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The balor makes one Flame Whip attack and one Lightning Blade attack.

entries.name: Flame Whip
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 30 ft. Hit: 18 (3d6 + 8) Force damage plus 17 (5d6) Fire damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, the balor pulls the target up to 25 feet straight toward itself, and the target has the Prone condition.

entries.name: Lightning Blade
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. Hit: 21 (3d8 + 8) Force damage plus 22 (4d10) Lightning damage, and the target can't take Reactions until the start of the balor's next turn.

entries.name: Teleport
entries.text: The balor teleports itself or a willing demon within 10 feet of itself up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space the balor can see. Bandits

entries.name: Scimitar
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Slashing damage.

entries.name: Light Crossbow
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +3, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The bandit makes two attacks, using Scimitar and Pistol in any combination.

entries.name: Scimitar
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

entries.name: Pistol
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 30/90 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Piercing damage.

entries.name: Parry
entries.text: Trigger: The bandit is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The bandit adds 2 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

entries.name: Barbed Hide
entries.text: At the start of each of its turns, the devil deals 5 (1d10) Piercing damage to any creature it is grappling or any creature grappling it.

entries.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries.text: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

entries.name: Magic Resistance

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The devil makes one Claws attack and one Tail attack, or it makes two Hurl Flame attacks.

entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13) from both claws.

entries.name: Tail
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) Slashing damage.

entries.name: Hurl Flame
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 150 ft. Hit: 17 (5d6) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning. Barlgura

entries.name: Bite
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

entries.name: Petrifying Gaze (Recharge 4–6)
entries.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. If the basilisk sees its reflection within the Cone, the basilisk must make this save. First Failure: The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second Failure: The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition. Bearded Devil

entries.name: Magic Resistance
entries.text: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries.name: Beard
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the devil's next turn. Until this poison ends, the target can't regain Hit Points.

entries.name: Infernal Glaive
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature and doesn't already have an infernal wound, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12. Failure: The target receives an infernal wound. While wounded, the target loses 5 (1d10) Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. The wound closes after 1 minute, after a spell restores Hit Points to the target, or after the target or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to stanch the wound, doing so by succeeding on a DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check. Andrea Piparo Behir

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The behir makes one Bite attack and uses Constrict.

entries.name: Bite
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) Piercing damage plus 11 (2d10) Lightning damage.

entries.name: Constrict
entries.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 18, one Large or smaller creature the behir can see within 5 feet. Failure: 28 (5d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 16), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

entries.name: Lightning Breath (Recharge 5–6)
entries.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 16, each creature in a 90-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 66 (12d10) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

entries.name: Swallow
entries.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 18, one Large or smaller creature Grappled by the behir (the behir can have only one creature swallowed at a time). Failure: The behir swallows the target, which is no longer Grappled. While swallowed, a creature has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the behir, and takes 21 (6d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the behir's turns. If the behir takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the behir must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls in a space within 10 feet of the behir and has the Prone condition. If the behir dies, a swallowed creature is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone. Beholder

entries.name: Amorphous
entries.text: The pudding can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

entries.name: Corrosive Form
entries.text: A creature that hits the pudding with a melee attack roll takes 4 (1d8) Acid damage. Nonmagical ammunition is destroyed immediately after hitting the pudding and dealing any damage. Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the pudding and coming into contact with it. The weapon is destroyed if the penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the weapon. In 1 minute, the pudding can eat through 2 feet of nonmagical wood or metal.

entries.name: Spider Climb
entries.text: The pudding can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

entries.name: Dissolving Pseudopod
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) Acid damage. Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor.

entries.name: Split
entries.text: Trigger: While the pudding is Large or Medium and has 10+ Hit Points, it becomes Bloodied or is subjected to Lightning or Slashing damage. Response: The pudding splits into two new Black Puddings. Each new pudding is one size smaller than the original pudding and acts on its Initiative. The original pudding's Hit Points are divided evenly between the new puddings (round down). Blights

entries.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 22, each creature in an 90-foot-long, 10-foot-wide Line. Failure: 63 (14d8) Acid damage. Success: Half damage.

entries.name: Slowing Breath
entries.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 22, each creature in a 90-foot Cone. Failure: The target can't take Reactions; its Speed is halved; and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. This effect lasts until the end of its next turn.

entries.name: Spellcasting
entries.text: The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 21): At will: Detect Magic, Mind Spike (level 5 version), Minor Illusion, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell) 1/day each: Greater Restoration, Major Image, Project Image

sections.title: Legendary Actions
sections.intro: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair): Immediately after another creature's turn, the dragon can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The dragon regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

entries.name: Giggling Magic
entries.text: Charisma Saving Throw: DC 21, one creature the dragon can see within 120 feet. Failure: 31 (9d6) Psychic damage. Until the end of its next turn, the target rolls 1d8 whenever it makes an ability check or attack roll and subtracts the number rolled from the D20 Test. Failure or Success: The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

entries.name: Mind Jolt
entries.text: The dragon uses Spellcasting to cast Mind Spike (level 5 version). The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

entries.name: Pounce
entries.text: The dragon moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

entries.name: Shielded Mind
entries.text: The couatl's thoughts can't be read by any means, and other creatures can communicate with it telepathically only if it allows them.

entries.name: Bite
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (1d12 + 5) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the couatl's next turn.

entries.name: Constrict
entries.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, one Medium or smaller creature the couatl can see within 5 feet. Failure: 8 (1d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

entries.name: Spellcasting
entries.text: The couatl casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15): At will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell) 1/day each: Create Food and Water, Dream, Greater Restoration, Scrying, Sleep

entries.name: Divine Aid (2/Day)
entries.text: The couatl casts Bless, Lesser Restoration, or Sanctuary, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. Crawling Claws

statblock.flavor: Medium swarm of Tiny Undead, Neutral Evil

entries.name: Swarm
entries.text: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

entries.name: Swarm of Grasping Hands
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 20 (4d8 + 2) Necrotic damage, or 11 (2d8 + 2) Necrotic damage if the swarm is Bloodied. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition. Cultists

entries.name: Ritual Sickle
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 1 Necrotic damage.

entries.name: Pact Blade
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

entries.name: Spellcasting
entries.text: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks): At will: Light, Thaumaturgy 2/day: Command 1/day: Hold Person

entries.name: Spiritual Weapon (2/Day)
entries.text: The cultist casts the Spiritual Weapon spell, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

entries.name: Crush
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage, and the darkmantle attaches to the target. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the darkmantle had Advantage on the attack roll, it covers the target, which has the Blinded condition and is suffocating while the darkmantle is attached in this way. While attached to a target, the darkmantle can attack only the target but has Advantage on its attack rolls. Its Speed becomes 0, it can't benefit from any bonus to its Speed, and it moves with the target. A creature can take an action to try to detach the darkmantle from itself, doing so with a successful DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. On its turn, the darkmantle can detach itself by using 5 feet of movement.

entries.name: Darkness Aura (1/Day)
entries.text: Magical Darkness fills a 15-foot Emanation originating from the darkmantle. This effect lasts while the darkmantle maintains Concentration on it, up to 10 minutes. Darkvision can't penetrate this area, and no light can illuminate it. Death Dog

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The death dog makes two Bite attacks.

entries.name: Bite
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12. First Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition. While Poisoned, the target's Hit Point maximum doesn't return to normal when finishing a Long Rest, and it repeats the save every 24 hours that elapse, ending the effect on itself on a success. Subsequent Failures: The Poisoned target's Hit Point maximum decreases by 5 (1d10). Death Knights

entries.name: Exalted Restoration
entries.text: If the deva dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

entries.name: Magic Resistance
entries.text: The deva has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The deva makes two Holy Mace attacks.

entries.name: Holy Mace
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

entries.name: Spellcasting
entries.text: The deva casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17): At will: Detect Evil and Good, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell) 1/day each: Commune, Raise Dead

entries.name: Divine Aid (2/Day)
entries.text: The deva casts Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. Displacer Beast

entries.name: Elemental Restoration
entries.text: If the djinni dies outside the Elemental Plane of Air, its body dissolves into mist, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Air.

entries.name: Magic Resistance
entries.text: The djinni has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries.name: Wishes
entries.text: The djinni has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the djinni knows it, the djinni can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the djinni can understand. If the djinni casts the spell for the creature, the djinni suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the djinni has cast it three times, the djinni can't do so again for 365 days.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The djinni makes three attacks, using Storm Blade or Storm Bolt in any combination.

entries.name: Storm Blade
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 feet. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Lightning damage.

entries.name: Spellcasting
entries.text: The djinni casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17): At will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic 2/day each: Create Food and Water (can create wine instead of water), Tongues, Wind Walk 1/day each: Creation, Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift

entries.name: Storm Bolt
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 120 feet. Hit: 13 (3d8) Thunder damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

entries.name: Create Whirlwind
entries.text: The djinni conjures a whirlwind at a point it can see within 120 feet. The whirlwind fills a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high Cylinder centered on that point. The whirlwind lasts until the djinni's Concentration on it ends. The djinni can move the whirlwind up to 20 feet at the start of each of its turns. Whenever the whirlwind enters a creature's space or a creature enters the whirlwind, that creature is subjected to the following effect. Strength Saving Throw: DC 17 (a creature makes this save only once per turn, and the djinni is unaffected). Failure: While in the whirlwind, the target has the Restrained condition and moves with the whirlwind. At the start of each of its turns, the Restrained target takes 21 (6d6) Thunder damage. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. Doppelganger

usageFields.name: Create Food and Water (can create wine instead of water) (2/Day)

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The doppelganger makes two Slam attacks and uses Unsettling Visage if available.

entries.name: Read Thoughts
entries.text: The doppelganger casts Detect Thoughts, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12).

entries.name: Slam
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6 (with Advantage during the first round of each combat), reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

entries.name: Unsettling Visage (Recharge 6)
entries.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation originating from the doppelganger that can see the doppelganger. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

entries.name: Shape-Shift
entries.text: The doppelganger shape-shifts into a Medium or Small Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. Dracolich

entries.name: Amphibious
entries.text: The dragon can breathe air and water.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The dragon makes three Bite attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tail attack.

entries.name: Bite
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 15 ft. Hit: 23 (3d10 + 7) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

entries.name: Tail
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 15 ft. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

entries.name: Steam Breath (Recharge 5–6)
entries.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 19, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 56 (16d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage. Dretches

details.label: Languages
details.value: Abyssal; telepathy 60 ft. (works only with creatures that understand Abyssal)

entries.name: Rend
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Slashing damage.

entries.name: Fetid Cloud (1/Day)
entries.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the dretch. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the creature can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both, and it can't take Reactions.

entries.name: Spider Climb
entries.text: The drider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

entries.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries.text: While in sunlight, the drider has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

entries.name: Web Walker
entries.text: The drider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the drider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The drider makes three attacks, using Foreleg or Poison Burst in any combination.

entries.name: Foreleg
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

entries.name: Poison Burst
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 120 ft. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) Poison damage.

entries.name: Magic of the Spider Queen (Recharge 5–6)
entries.text: The drider casts Darkness, Faerie Fire, or Web, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14). Druid

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The druid makes two attacks, using Vine Staff or Verdant Wisp in any combination.

entries.name: Vine Staff
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

entries.name: Spellcasting
entries.text: The druid casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13): At will: Druidcraft, Speak with Animals 2/day each: Entangle, Thunderwave 1/day each: Animal Messenger, Longstrider, Moonbeam

entries.name: Verdant Wisp
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 90 ft. Hit: 10 (3d6) Radiant damage. Dryad

entries.name: Magic Resistance
entries.text: The dryad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
entries.text: The dryad can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The dryad makes one Vine Lash or Thorn Burst attack, and it can use Spellcasting to cast Charm Monster.

entries.name: Vine Lash
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage.

entries.name: Spellcasting
entries.text: The dryad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14): At will: Animal Friendship, Charm Monster (lasts 24 hours; ends early if the dryad casts the spell again), Druidcraft 1/day each: Entangle, Pass without Trace

entries.name: Thorn Burst
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 60 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

entries.name: Tree Stride
entries.text: If within 5 feet of a Large or bigger tree, the dryad teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a second Large or bigger tree that is within 60 feet of the previous tree.

details.label: Senses
details.value: Darkvision 60 ft., Tremorsense 60 ft., Passive Perception 10

entries.name: Earth Glide
entries.text: The elemental can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the elemental doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

entries.name: Siege Monster
entries.text: The elemental deals double damage to objects and structures.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The elemental makes two attacks, using Slam or Rock Launch in any combination.

entries.name: Slam
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage.

entries.name: Rock Launch
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 60 ft. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition. Efreeti

entries.name: Elemental Restoration
entries.text: If the efreeti dies outside the Elemental Plane of Fire, its body dissolves into ash, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Fire.

entries.name: Magic Resistance
entries.text: The efreeti has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries.name: Wishes
entries.text: The efreeti has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the efreeti knows it, the efreeti can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the efreeti can understand. If the efreeti casts the spell for the creature, the efreeti suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the efreeti has cast it three times, the efreeti can't do so again for 365 days.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The efreeti makes three attacks, using Heated Blade or Hurl Flame in any combination.

entries.name: Heated Blade
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 13 (2d12) Fire damage.

entries.name: Hurl Flame
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 120 ft. Hit: 24 (7d6) Fire damage.

entries.name: Spellcasting
entries.text: The efreeti casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16): At will: Detect Magic, Elementalism 1/day each: Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift, Tongues, Wall of Fire (level 7 version) Elemental Cataclysm

usageFields.name: Wall of Fire (level 7 version) Elemental Cataclysm (1/Day)

entries.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries.text: If the erinyes dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

entries.name: Magic Resistance
entries.text: The erinyes has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries.name: Magic Rope
entries.text: The erinyes has a magic rope. While bearing it, the erinyes can use the Entangling Rope action. The rope has AC 20, HP 90, and Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage. The rope turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points, if it is 5+ feet away from the erinyes for 1 hour or more, or if the erinyes dies. If the rope is damaged or destroyed, the erinyes can fully restore it when finishing a Short or Long Rest.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The erinyes makes three Withering Sword attacks and can use Entangling Rope.

entries.name: Withering Sword
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage.

entries.name: Entangling Rope (Requires Magic Rope)
entries.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the erinyes can see within 120 feet. Failure: 14 (4d6) Force damage, and the target has the Restrained condition until the rope is destroyed, the erinyes uses a Bonus Action to release the target, or the erinyes uses Entangling Rope again.

entries.name: Parry
entries.text: Trigger: The erinyes is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The erinyes adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss. Ettercap

entries.name: Spider Climb
entries.text: The ettercap can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

entries.name: Web Walker
entries.text: The ettercap ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the ettercap knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The ettercap makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

entries.name: Bite
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the ettercap's next turn.

entries.name: Claw
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

entries.name: Web Strand (Recharge 5–6)
entries.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, one Large or smaller creature the ettercap can see within 30 feet. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage).

entries.name: Reel
entries.text: The ettercap pulls one creature within 30 feet of itself that is Restrained by its Web Strand up to 25 feet straight toward itself. Ettin

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The ettin makes one Battleaxe attack and one Morningstar attack.

entries.name: Battleaxe
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

entries.name: Morningstar
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage, and the target has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

entries.name: Fire Aura
entries.text: At the end of each of the elemental's turns, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the elemental takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage. Creatures and flammable objects in the Emanation start burning.

entries.name: Fire Form
entries.text: The elemental can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so, and it can enter a creature's space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage.

entries.name: Illumination
entries.text: The elemental sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

entries.name: Water Susceptibility
entries.text: The elemental takes 3 (1d6) Cold damage for every 5 feet the elemental moves in water or for every gallon of water splashed on it.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The elemental makes two Burn attacks.

entries.name: Burn
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it starts burning. Fire Giant

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The giant makes two attacks, using Flame Sword or Hammer Throw in any combination.

entries.name: Flame Sword
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +11, reach 10 ft. Hit: 21 (4d6 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

entries.name: Hammer Throw
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +11, range 60/240 ft. Hit: 23 (3d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Fire damage, and the target is pushed up to 15 feet straight away from the giant and has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn. Flameskull

details.label: Languages
details.value: Understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

entries.name: Aversion to Fire
entries.text: If the golem takes Fire damage, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

entries.name: Berserk
entries.text: Whenever the golem starts its turn Bloodied, roll 1d6. On a 6, the golem goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the golem attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the golem attacks an object. Once the golem goes berserk, it remains so until it is destroyed or it is no longer Bloodied. The golem's creator, if within 60 feet of the berserk golem, can try to calm it by taking an action to make a DC 15 Charisma (Persuasion) check; the golem must be able to hear its creator. If this check succeeds, the golem ceases being berserk until the start of its next turn, at which point it resumes rolling for the Berserk trait again if it is still Bloodied.

entries.name: Immutable Form
entries.text: The golem can't shape-shift.

entries.name: Lightning Absorption
entries.text: Whenever the golem is subjected to Lightning damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Lightning damage dealt.

entries.name: Magic Resistance
entries.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The golem makes two Slam attacks.

entries.name: Slam
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Lightning damage. Flumph

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The giant makes two attacks, using Frost Axe or Great Bow in any combination.

entries.name: Frost Axe
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Cold damage.

entries.name: Great Bow
entries.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Cold damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

entries.name: War Cry (Recharge 5–6)
entries.text: The giant or one creature of its choice that can see or hear it gains 16 (2d10 + 5) Temporary Hit Points and has Advantage on attack rolls until the start of the giant's next turn. Fungi

entries.name: Shriek
entries.text: Trigger: A creature or a source of Bright Light moves within 30 feet of the shrieker. Response: The shrieker emits a shriek audible within 300 feet of itself for 1 minute or until the shrieker dies. Violet Fungus Necrohulk Violet Fungus Necrohulk Viktor Titov

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The fungus makes two Rotting Touch attacks.

entries.name: Rotting Touch
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 10 ft. Hit: 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage.

entries.name: Flyby
entries.text: The gargoyle doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

entries.name: Multiattack
entries.text: The gargoyle makes two Claw attacks.

entries.name: Claw
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage. Gelatinous Cube

entries.name: Ooze Cube
entries.text: The cube fills its entire space and is transparent. Other creatures can enter that space, but a creature that does so is subjected to the cube's Engulf and has Disadvantage on the saving throw. Creatures inside the cube have Total Cover, and the cube can hold one Large creature or up to four Medium or Small creatures inside itself at a time. As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the cube can pull a creature or an object out of the cube by succeeding on a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) check, and the puller takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage.

entries.name: Transparent
entries.text: Even when the cube is in plain sight, a creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice the cube if the creature hasn't witnessed the cube move or otherwise act.

entries.name: Pseudopod
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (3d6 + 2) Acid damage.

entries.name: Engulf
entries.text: The cube moves up to its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks. The cube can move through the spaces of Large or smaller creatures if it has room inside itself to contain them (see the Ooze Cube trait). Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature whose space the cube enters for the first time during this move. Failure: 10 (3d6) Acid damage, and the target is engulfed. An engulfed target is suffocating, can't cast spells with a Verbal component, has the Restrained condition, and takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the cube's turns. When the cube moves, the engulfed target moves with it. An engulfed target can try to escape by taking an action to make a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) check. On a successful check, the target escapes and enters the nearest unoccupied space. Success: Half damage, and the target moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the cube. If there is no unoccupied space, the target fails the save instead. Ghasts

entries.name: Stench
entries.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, any creature that starts its turn in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the ghast. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn. Success: The target is immune to this ghast's Stench for 24 hours.

entries.name: Bite
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Necrotic damage.

entries.name: Claw
entries.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a non-Undead creature, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

entries.name: Ethereal Sight
entries.text: The ghost can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane.

entries.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries.text: The ghost can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

entries.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 60-foot Cone that can see the ghost and isn't an Undead. Failure: 10 (2d6 + 3) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the ghost's next turn. Success: The target is immune to this ghost's Horrific Visage for 24 hours.

entries.name: Possession (Recharge 6)
entries.text: Charisma Saving Throw: DC 13, one Humanoid the ghost can see within 5 feet. Failure: The target is possessed by the ghost; the ghost disappears, and the target has the Incapacitated condition and loses control of its body. The ghost now controls the body, but the target retains awareness. The ghost can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that specifically target Undead. The ghost's game statistics are the same, except it uses the possessed target's Speed, as well as the target's Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution modifiers. The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 Hit Points or the ghost leaves as a Bonus Action. When the possession ends, the ghost appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target, and the target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours. Success: The target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours. Ghouls

Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. Failure: 18 (4d8) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. entries.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 23, one creature the kraken can see within 120 feet. Failure: 33 (6d10) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

entries.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, one creature Grappled by the kraken (it can have up to four creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: 23 (3d8 + 10) Piercing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is swallowed and no longer Grappled. A swallowed creature has the Restrained condition, has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the kraken, and takes 24 (7d6) Acid damage at the start of each of its turns. If the kraken takes 50 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the kraken must succeed on a DC 25 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the kraken with the Prone condition. If the kraken dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

sections.title: Legendary Actions
sections.intro: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair): Immediately after another creature's turn, the mummy lord can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The mummy lord regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

The hag must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

The bag turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points. If the bag is destroyed, any souls the bag is holding are released. The hag can create a new bag after 7 days.

Only the hag can serve as the spell's messenger, and the target must be a creature the hag can see on the Material Plane. The spell fails and is wasted if the target is under the effect of the Protection from Evil and Good spell or within a Magic Circle spell. If the target takes damage from the Dream spell, the target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to that damage. If the spell kills the target, its soul is trapped in the hag's soul bag, and the target can't be raised from the dead until its soul is released.

To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the guardian while within 5 feet of it. The spell has no effect but is stored within the guardian. Any previously stored spell is lost when a new spell is stored. The guardian can cast the spell stored with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no spell components and using the caster's spellcasting ability. The stored spell is then lost.

sections.title: Legendary Actions
sections.intro: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair): Immediately after another creature's turn, the dragon can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The dragon regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

entries.name: Freezing Burst
entries.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point the dragon can see within 120 feet. Failure: 7 (2d6) Cold damage, and the target's Speed is 0 until the end of the target's next turn. Failure or Success: The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

entries.name: Frightful Presence
entries.text: The dragon casts Fear, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14). The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.
